last_episode_to_air.name: Friends in Low Places
last_episode_to_air.overview: Red and Kitty hit an obstacle on the way to Paris. With the house free, word spreads and the gang must contain a party that brings all sorts of chaos.

name: That '90s Show
overview: Hello, Wisconsin! It's 1995 and Leia Forman, daughter of Eric and Donna, is visiting her grandparents for the summer where she bonds with a new generation of Point Place kids under the watchful eye of Kitty and the stern glare of Red. Sex, drugs and rock 'n roll never dies, it just changes clothes.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Hello, Wisconsin! It's 1995 and Leia Forman, daughter of Eric and Donna, is visiting her grandparents for the summer where she bonds with a new generation of Point Place kids under the watchful eye of Kitty and the stern glare of Red. Sex, drugs and rock 'n roll never dies, it just changes clothes.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Leia returns to Point Place for the summer of '96 and reunites with her pals, but the thrills and troubles of adolescence send the gang into a tailspin.

episodes.name: That '90s Pilot
episodes.overview: Donna and Eric spend the Fourth of July at his parents’ house in Point Place, where their daughter Leia makes an impression on the other teens in town.

episodes.name: Free Leia
episodes.overview: Eager to impress her friends, Leia goes on a quest to find the perfect flick for movie night. Kitty and Red get to know their new neighbor, Sherri.

episodes.name: Lip Smackers
episodes.overview: After Sherri dishes about her date, Kitty steps in to help her break things off with her beau. A never-been-kissed Leia decides it's time to pucker up.

episodes.name: Rave
episodes.overview: Jay and Leia are crushing on each other, but who will make the first move? Meanwhile, Ozzie’s plans for the gang to go to a rave in Milwaukee backfire.

episodes.name: Step by Step
episodes.overview: Ozzie’s efforts to set up Kitty’s new computer put Leia in an awkward position. An ad for a free jacuzzi lands Nate and Jay in hot water.

episodes.name: The Birthday Girl
episodes.overview: Leia forges ahead with her 15th birthday party, inspired by “Beverly Hills, 90210.” Red finds himself in a competition to get Leia the perfect gift.

episodes.name: Boyfriend Day One
episodes.overview: Trying to prove to Red he can be responsible, Jay agrees to run an errand that doesn’t quite go as planned. Nikki’s tutor makes Nate jealous.

episodes.name: Summer Storm
episodes.overview: A rainy day gives Kitty a chance to declutter, but chaos ensues when she clears out the kids’ special stash. Leia asks Nikki for relationship advice.

episodes.name: Dirty Double Booker
episodes.overview: With the clock ticking on her summer in Point Place, Leia feels torn about who to spend her time with. Kitty considers starting a new job.

episodes.name: Kids in America
episodes.overview: As Sherri deals with her landlord, Leia’s last day in town gets complicated after Jay expresses doubts about a long-distance relationship.

1.name: Season 1
1.overview: Hello, Wisconsin! It's 1995 and Leia Forman, daughter of Eric and Donna, is visiting her grandparents for the summer where she bonds with a new generation of Point Place kids under the watchful eye of Kitty and the stern glare of Red. Sex, drugs and rock 'n roll never dies, it just changes clothes.

episodes.name: You Oughta Know
episodes.overview: Back in Point Place, Leia dreads having to come clean to Jay and Nikki about what happened last summer. Kitty strongly urges Donna to move back home.

episodes.name: Something to Talk About
episodes.overview: As Leia and Nate go on their apology tour, Nikki ices them out and Jay thinks of ways to get even. Kitty and Red meet their potential new neighbor.

episodes.name: Just a Friend
episodes.overview: Leia snags a job at the mall to spend more time with Gwen. Nikki tortures a heartbroken Nate. Red and Kitty try to break out of their rut.

episodes.name: Hold My Hand
episodes.overview: Gwen worries her hookup is turning into something serious. Jealousy creeps in when an injured Kitty starts to imagine that the neighbors are wooing Red.

episodes.name: What Is Love
episodes.overview: At a field party, Ozzie tries to drink his woes away, Nikki bets Nate she can get more phone numbers and Leia gears up for Jay's big romantic gesture.

episodes.name: I Can See Clearly Now
episodes.overview: To prove to Leia he's changed, Jay tries to make amends with his past. Kitty visits a healer. When the girls attempt to shoplift, Gwen becomes a target.

episodes.name: Baby-Baby-Baby
episodes.overview: When Leia and Jay reveal that they're taking their relationship to the next level, Red lands in the hospital. Nikki takes a test that puts Nate on edge.

episodes.name: Friends in Low Places
episodes.overview: Red and Kitty hit an obstacle on the way to Paris. With the house free, word spreads and the gang must contain a party that brings all sorts of chaos.

2.name: Season 2
2.overview: Leia returns to Point Place for the summer of '96 and reunites with her pals, but the thrills and troubles of adolescence send the gang into a tailspin.
